app.name: daily.dev App Suite
app.one_liner: A monorepo containing the daily.dev web application and browser extension with shared components for consistent feature delivery.

screens.name: Main Feed
screens.purpose: Display a personalized feed of developer news articles sourced from trusted publications.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a selected news item to the user's saved list for later reference.

mvp_plan: week 1: Bootstrap web app and extension scaffolds
week 1: Set up monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces
acceptance_tests: Saved items are synchronized between web and extension platforms.
User can view the main feed of developer news in both web and extension interfaces.
